metadata.name: Local agent execution workspace operation (valid)
metadata.description: Conformance fixture: a local agent execution with mandatory policy gate, declared filesystem side effects, and agent.execution.evidence emission. agent-machine integration target.

steps.name: emit-policy-gate
steps.run: sourceosctl workspace-ops policy-gate record --operation-id op-003 --policy sourceos.agent.execution.admission --result allow

steps.name: run-local-agent
steps.run: sourceosctl workspace-ops local-agent-execution run --operation-id op-003 --agent agent-machine --model llama3:8b --prompt-ref sha256:dddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddd --side-effects filesystem --output-root ~/Documents/SourceOS/agent-output

steps.name: emit-agent-execution-evidence
steps.run: sourceosctl workspace-ops evidence emit --operation-id op-003 --kind agent.execution.evidence --execution-id exec-001
